baseline.name: Human Navigation Economy
baseline.description: Traditional browsing. Humans navigate, discover, and transact through attention-driven funnels.

delegated.name: Delegated Agent Economy
delegated.description: Agents browse on behalf of humans. Navigation compressed. Attention layers bypassed.

hybrid.name: Hybrid Transition
hybrid.description: Partial delegation. Some tasks automated, others human-directed. Brand still matters.

delegation_level.label: Delegation Level
delegation_level.description: How much browsing and decision-making is delegated to agents

agent_optimization_priority.label: Agent Optimization Priority
agent_optimization_priority.description: What agents optimize for on behalf of humans

human_brand_influence.label: Human Brand Influence
human_brand_influence.description: How much brand loyalty persists in purchase decisions
